what_it_does: Declares the 'mode' coordinate axis — how a surface behaves. Exports an AXIS dict with id/namespace 'mode', one discrete sub-field 'current' (pilot | inspect | dev | autopilot), value_source='live', and a desc. The mode-selector and a mode->colour cascade resolve against it; driving a mode re-resolves.
observations: Single discrete sub-field 'current' with enum pilot/inspect/dev/autopilot, described as a behaviour/render-family pick.
desc names two consumers: the mode-selector and the mode->colour cascade; states 'drive a mode -> re-resolve'.
standouts: Frames the four modes as a single 'stability dial' — a render-family / behaviour selector.
The mode->colour cascade tie: changing mode re-resolves downstream colour.
conventions: Follows the AXIS-dict row shape from axes/AGENTS.md.
Minimal single-discrete-field structure shared with register.py and resolution.py.
value_source='live' consistent with sibling live axes.
notes: The behaviour/render-family axis with four modes (pilot/inspect/dev/autopilot); changing it re-resolves a mode->colour cascade.
questions: What concretely distinguishes the four modes (pilot vs inspect vs dev vs autopilot) in behaviour or render-family?
Where is the mode->colour cascade defined?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — declared as the behaviour axis and the AXIS dict implements exactly that.
apparent_themes: Mode as a single behaviour/render-family coordinate
intention_signals: Trying to make a surface's operating mode a resolver coordinate so that selecting a mode re-resolves behaviour and downstream styling (the mode->colour cascade) uniformly, rather than branching per-mode in code.
contribution: Contributes the 'mode' coordinate dimension and its pilot/inspect/dev/autopilot vocabulary, plus the mode->colour cascade tie that re-resolves on change.
summary_for_embedding: Axis-registry file declaring the 'mode' coordinate (discrete current: pilot/inspect/dev/autopilot) that the mode-selector and mode->colour cascade resolve against.
intention_for_embedding: To make operating mode a resolver coordinate so changing it re-resolves behaviour and downstream colour uniformly.
